title: Venturer
description: Venturer enhances the Minecraft world with new vanilla+ content that encourages players to explore
body:
![Replace this with a description](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/59824ce0762b93c19de701a9d48e175971ee09ab.png)
______________________________________________________________

Venturer is a Forge Vanilla Styled overworld expansion mod that adds new content that encourages players to explore the Minecraft world

Currently Venturer Adds:

-  Ice Temples in Frozen Oceans
  
-  Stinging Nettles in Swamps and Birch Forests
  
-  New Items and Potion Effects from Stinging Nettles 
  
-  New Loot Items and a New Music Disc and Armor Trim found in Frozen Temples
  
______________________________________________________________

Compat:


-   Farmers Delight: When farmers delight is installed Bags of Nettle Leaves are added as well   as cooking pot and cutting board recipes for nettles
  
-   The Salt: Nettle Soup is added as a salt-able food
  
-  JEED: Adds descriptions to this mods potion effects
  
-  Supplementaries: Adds nettle soup support for Supplementaries jars


______________________________________________________________
